Chapter 4 Quiz

The Full Stack PMM — Test your understanding

0/10
Questions Correct
QUESTION 01
What is the defining characteristic of a Full Stack PMM?
QUESTION 02
According to the T-Shape model, what represents the "vertical" that is irreplaceable?
QUESTION 03
In the AI-Enabled Workflow, what happens to commodity execution time?
QUESTION 04
What is the most counterintuitive finding about Full Stack PMMs and narrative/positioning time?
QUESTION 05
In the Depth/Breadth Matrix, what characterizes the "Generalist" profile?
QUESTION 06
What are the three layers in the Stack Architecture?
QUESTION 07
What is the "judgment loop" in the Stack Architecture?
QUESTION 08
What is the correct sequence of the "Three Moves" to become a Full Stack PMM?
QUESTION 09
Why does building the stack come first in the Three Moves sequence?
QUESTION 10
Why does the Full Stack PMM "compound" over time?
